sections.content: The agent moved RIGHT again - 55 cells changed, animation shows the agent moving from (8,20) to the right. Let me check the new position. The agent seems to be moving through the maze, jumping between rooms. Let me track the agent's position and understand the movement pattern.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check agent position after second RIGHT
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']

# Find the blue agent
for n in nodes:
    if n['hash'] == 'fa982fde30da5312':  # agent hash
        print(f"Agent: boundary={n['boundary']}, pixels={n['pixels']}")

# Let me also look at the maze area to see where the agent is now
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
for i in range(7, 16):
    line = ascii_lines[i]
    maze_row = line[13:51]
    readable = maze_row.replace('W', '.').replace('B', '#').replace('b', '@').replace('R', 'r')
    print(f"{i:2d}: {readable}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
